query:
-- Step 1: Add groupTotalCost column to revenue_groups if not exists
ALTER TABLE revenue_groups ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS totalCost DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00;

-- Step 2: Create Data Bundle revenue groups from services sharing the same
-- "Data - Internet" revenue (same customer + same monthlyRevenue, multiple services)
INSERT INTO revenue_groups (groupId, name, type, customerExternalId, customerName, totalRevenue, autoDetected)
SELECT
  CONCAT('data-', s.customerExternalId, '-', CAST(s.monthlyRevenue AS CHAR)) AS groupId,
  'Data - Internet' AS name,
  'data_bundle' AS type,
  s.customerExternalId,
  s.customerName,
  s.monthlyRevenue AS totalRevenue,
  1 AS autoDetected
FROM services s
WHERE
  s.monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND s.revenueGroupId IS NULL
  AND s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND s.customerExternalId != ''
  AND (
    s.serviceType = 'Internet'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%NBN%'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%Broadband%'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%Fibre%'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%Internet%'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%Data%'
  )
GROUP BY s.customerExternalId, s.monthlyRevenue
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = name;

-- Step 3: Tag services with their Data Bundle groupId
UPDATE services s
JOIN (
  SELECT
    CONCAT('data-', s2.customerExternalId, '-', CAST(s2.monthlyRevenue AS CHAR)) AS groupId,
    s2.customerExternalId,
    s2.monthlyRevenue
  FROM services s2
  WHERE
    s2.monthlyRevenue > 0
    AND s2.revenueGroupId IS NULL
    AND s2.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
    AND s2.customerExternalId != ''
    AND (
      s2.serviceType = 'Internet'
      OR s2.planName LIKE '%NBN%'
      OR s2.planName LIKE '%Broadband%'
      OR s2.planName LIKE '%Fibre%'
      OR s2.planName LIKE '%Internet%'
      OR s2.planName LIKE '%Data%'
    )
  GROUP BY s2.customerExternalId, s2.monthlyRevenue
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) grp ON s.customerExternalId = grp.customerExternalId AND s.monthlyRevenue = grp.monthlyRevenue
SET s.revenueGroupId = grp.groupId, s.revenueGroupLabel = 'Data - Internet'
WHERE
  s.revenueGroupId IS NULL
  AND (
    s.serviceType = 'Internet'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%NBN%'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%Broadband%'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%Fibre%'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%Internet%'
    OR s.planName LIKE '%Data%'
  );

-- Step 4: Compute groupTotalCost for ALL revenue groups (sum of monthlyCost of all services in group)
UPDATE revenue_groups rg
JOIN (
  SELECT revenueGroupId, SUM(monthlyCost) AS totalCost
  FROM services
  WHERE revenueGroupId IS NOT NULL AND revenueGroupId != ''
  GROUP BY revenueGroupId
) costs ON rg.groupId = costs.revenueGroupId
SET rg.totalCost = costs.totalCost;

-- Step 5: Verify results
SELECT type, COUNT(*) as groupCount, SUM(totalRevenue) as totalRev, SUM(totalCost) as totalCost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN totalCost > totalRevenue THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lossGroups
FROM revenue_groups
GROUP BY type;

-- Step 4: Compute groupTotalCost for ALL revenue groups (sum of monthlyCost of all services in group)

-- Step 5: Verify results

FROM revenue_groups
